since_last: 61% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +1.98%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -1.51% · Gold +0.45% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 61% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +1.98%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.98%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.21%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +24.73%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +24.73%, AMAT +3.34%, LRCX +2.24%, SMCI +1.95%, KLAC +1.84%. Laggards: DLR -4.96%, TTD -2.41%, HON -1.90%, WDAY -1.08%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.97% at $162.6
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.97% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
